title: Perspective and Authored Space
subtitle: Viewpoint, placement, and the authored space of signed writing
summary: Native anchor draft for the Writing and Representation in Sutton SignWriting series.
synopsis: This entry deepens the writing-systems lane by treating authored viewpoint, spatial relation, symbol placement, and passage orientation as part of the writing problem rather than as secondary visual detail. It follows Plane-Based Writing and Script Typology and prepares readers for The Shape of a Sign, Sign Text Layout, and the more formal signbox model.
